cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which of the descriptions about Yves Gomes is true. The options are A, B, C, D. I need to check the passage to find the correct answer. Wait, that would mean he was born in India and then moved to the U.S. with his parents when he was 14 months old. But the passage says that he may have to leave the country now (the U.S.) and go back to India, which he left with his parents when he was 14 months old. So if he left India when he was 14 months old, he was born in India, then moved to the U.S. So his parents are the ones who immigrated illegally. But the passage says he is an illegal immigrant. So if he was born in India, but moved to the U.S. when very young, then he is an illegal immigrant. So option A says he was born in India before his parents immigrated to America illegally.
